data.title: Trump Orders Crackdown On Chinese Investments In Key Sectors Including Technology Citing 'National Security' Concern
data.description: President Donald Trump has issued written orders to the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS) to curb Chinese investments in strategic sectors, marking a significant escalation in the administration's economic measures against China.

data.title: PEPE's Structure Similar To Dogecoin's 2021 Bull Cycle, Says Analyst Who Sees 'Unlimited' Potential For The Frog-Themed Crypto
data.description: A widely followed cryptocurrency commentator made a bold prediction about the potential of the frog-themed token Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) on Sunday, likening its structure to that of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) during the 2021 bull market.

data.title: This Analyst With 86% Accuracy Rate Sees Around 20% Upside In Booking Holdings - Here Are 5 Stock Picks For Last Week From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts

Warren Buffett Favors 5% Treasury Bills Over Buybacks As Berkshire Hathaway's Cash Pile Balloons To $334 Billion: 'The Rate Of Change… That's Most Telling,' Says Expert
data.description: Berkshire Hathaway's share repurchases have dropped as Warren Buffett appears to prefer 5% Treasury bills over buying back company stock.
